title: Skeleton Physics
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/rwl5sor.png) ## Give skeletons physics!





Requires OptiFine or CEM support! [View the pack on my website!](https://ewanhowell.com/resourcepacks/skeleton-physics/) This pack makes it so that when any of the skeleton entities die, instead of falling over to the side like normal, they collapse into a pile of bones!

### The entities this applies to are as follows: - Skeleton - Skeleton Horse - Stray - Wither Skeleton - The Wither - The Bogged



![](https://i.imgur.com/TKOBnK8.gif)
